name: Corn Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven to 375°F.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients except corn with a hand beater until smooth.
3. Stir in the corn.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of the mixture into the hot oil.
5. Fry for about 5 minutes or until deep golden brown, then drain on paper towels.
6. Serve with maple syrup if desired.
YIELD: 6 to 8 servings
